title: Adobe crams multiple AI tools into its experimental camera app - Engadget
summary: Adobe's Project Indigo camera app may be drifting away from its original appeal to smartphone photographers looking for a "natural SLR-like look." Instead, Adobe's Nextcam Team is adding a bunch of generative AI tools to its Project Indigo experimental camera app that…
